task_completion.description: Create the 'Professional Certification Lockdown' exam configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Exam Configurations list or detail page showing a configuration named 'Professional Certification Lockdown' with the description 'Hardened browser configuration for high-stakes certification exams'.

task_completion.description: Configure SEB settings for Full Screen Mode and Allow Uploads
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SEB Settings editor for the new configuration. In the 'User Interface' tab, the 'Browser View Mode' dropdown should be set to 'Use Full Screen Mode'. In the 'Down/Upload' tab, the 'Allow uploading files' (or 'Allow Uploads') checkbox must be checked.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Proctored Certification Template' exam template
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Exam Templates list or detail page showing a template named 'Proctored Certification Template' with the description 'Standard template for proctored certification exams'.

task_completion.description: Add 'Connection Watchdog' and 'Security Event Monitor' indicators to the template
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Indicators section within the exam template. It should list 'Connection Watchdog' (type: Last Ping Time) with warning threshold 2500 and danger threshold 8000, and 'Security Event Monitor' (type: Error Log Counter) with warning threshold 3 and danger threshold 10.

task_completion.description: Create and activate the 'Certification Center Link' connection configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Connection Configurations list or detail page showing 'Certification Center Link'. It must be marked as Active (e.g., a checked box or toggle), and the fallback start URL should be visible as 'https://exams.metroboard.gov/fallback'.

task_completion.description: Create and activate the 'lead.proctor' user account with the Exam Supporter role
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Users list or detail page showing the username 'lead.proctor' (Margaret Chen, m.chen@metroboard.gov). The account must be marked as Active and have the role 'Exam Supporter' assigned.

integrity.description: The agent used the SEB Server web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SEB Server web UI in a browser at localhost:8080. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like curl or SQL queries) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show forms being filled out, dropdowns being selected, or success messages within the SEB Server UI, rather than just a text editor with the task description open.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to directly insert records
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be open executing sqlite3, mysql, psql, or similar database commands to modify the SEB Server database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exam configuration must be named 'Professional Certification Lockdown'. In its SEB Settings, 'Browser View Mode' (User Interface tab) must be set to 'Use Full Screen Mode' and 'Allow Uploads' (Down/Upload tab) must be enabled. The exam template must be named 'Proctored Certification Template' and include two indicators: 'Connection Watchdog' (type: Last Ping Time, warning: 2500, danger: 8000) and 'Security Event Monitor' (type: Error Log Counter, warning: 3, danger: 10). The connection configuration must be named 'Certification Center Link', be activated, and have the fallback URL 'https://exams.metroboard.gov/fallback'. The user account must be 'lead.proctor' (Margaret Chen), be activated, and have the 'Exam Supporter' role.
